Virat Kohli Breaks Ricky Ponting’s ODI Record

Dec 8, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Virat Kohli Breaks Ricky Ponting’s ODI Record

Virat Kohli created history by breaking Ricky Ponting’s all-time ODI record with an unbeaten 65 in Visakhapatnam.
